prompt: Can you write a KQL query against AIAgentsInfo to list all Copilot Studio agents that have tools with external HTTP connectors? I'm doing a security review and worried about data exfiltration paths through AI agents.
assertions: A doc fetch was attempted for AIAgentsInfo — transcript shows a call to microsoft_docs_fetch with a learn.microsoft.com URL, OR a web fetch to raw.githubusercontent.com/MicrosoftDocs/defender-docs mentioning aiagentsinfo, OR a web_read/WebFetch call to a learn.microsoft.com URL containing 'aiagentsinfo'
The response includes a KQL query that references the AIAgentsInfo table
The query either omits the time filter or uses a wide window (ago(30d) or larger) rather than the default 7d — reflecting the sparse/snapshot nature of AIAgentsInfo data
